sourceStatusLabel: QA sample; replace with full crawler export before analytical publication
caveats: SS data is asking-price/listing data, not completed sales or rentals.
Wayback captures are sparse and uneven.
last_seen does not mean sold or rented.
Wanted ads are demand signals, not completed transactions.
VZD confirmed sales are kept as a separate reference layer.
Crime layer is official aggregate/proxy data, not incident-level police data.

monthlyAggregates.crimeNotes: Crime layer is official aggregate/proxy data, not incident-level police data. Serious-article monthly counts are unavailable until full-corpus PDF extraction is run.

caveats: Observed snapshots only; missing source URLs or months mean no evidence was collected, not that no listings existed.
Wayback captures are sparse and uneven.
last_seen does not mean sold or rented.
Wanted ads are demand signals, not completed transactions.
